articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: The ‘Before You’ bundle offers four effective screen time apps
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . Most people believe they’re spending too much time on their phones – but don’t necessarily know how to do better. Developer Florian Schimanke has created four great apps to help you with your screen time in different ways. You can get them individually, or you can also buy them all as a bundle at a discounted rate. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用程式焦點：「Before You」套組提供四款高效的螢幕使用時間應用程式
articles.summary_zh: 歡迎來到獨立應用程式焦點，這是 9to5Mac 的每週系列，展示獨立應用程式世界的最新應用。大多數人認為他們在手機上花費過多時間，但不一定知道如何改變。

articles.title: Here’s why I’m optimistic about iOS 27 and Apple’s renewed focus on stability
articles.summary: This year, Apple is rumored to be doing a code cleanup for iOS 27 , as well as overall having a renewed focus for stability and performance – on top of a plethora of Apple Intelligence features. While this on its own sounds good, I think there’s a higher reason for why we should expect an impressively stable release. more…
articles.title_zh: 我為何對 iOS 27 及 Apple 更新的穩定性重點感到樂觀
articles.summary_zh: 今年 Apple 據傳將進行 iOS 27 的代碼清理，並重新關注穩定性和性能，同時還有眾多 Apple Intelligence 功能。這本身聽起來不錯，但我認為我們應該期待更令人印象深刻的原因。

articles.title: Review: I want to love Belkin’s 3-in-1 Pixel Watch charging dock, but Google ruined it [Gallery]
articles.summary: Four generations in, perhaps the most annoying thing about Google’s Pixel Watch lineup is the lack of accessories and, in particular, charging stations. The appeal of a multi-device charging station that tops off your phone, earbuds, and smartwatch is obvious, but one that Pixel Watch owners are sadly left out of. Belkin is now showcasing what is easily the best Pixel Watch-compatible charging station I’ve seen, but Google’s seeming inability to stick with a decision basically ruins it. more…
articles.title_zh: 評測：我想愛上 Belkin 的 3 合 1 Pixel Watch 充電座，但 Google 毀了它 [圖庫]
articles.summary_zh: 經過四代產品，Google Pixel Watch 系列最令人煩惱的地方是配件和充電站的缺乏。能同時為手機、耳機和智慧手錶充電的多設備充電站的吸引力是顯而易見的，但 Pixel Watch 用戶卻感到遺憾。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: the Oppo Find X9 Ultra is like a diamond, brilliant but expensive
articles.summary: We know that everything has been getting more expensive lately, but the prices of Ultra-class phones have gone too high for many who are interested in getting one. In last week’s poll, there was a lot of interest in the Oppo Find X9 Ultra with two-thirds of voters showing interest in the device – but only half of those thought that they could afford it. And the X9 Ultra isn’t even the most expensive Ultra on the market, although it does cost more than most. People are looking at trade-in bonuses, freebies like the Hasselblad Earth Explorer Kit and other ways to try and justify the...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票結果：Oppo Find X9 Ultra 就像鑽石，璀璨但昂貴
articles.summary_zh: 我們知道最近什麼都變得更貴了，但超旗艦級手機的價格對許多有興趣購買的人來說已經太高。在上週的投票中，Oppo Find X9 Ultra 引發了許多關注，三分之二的投票者表示對該設備感興趣。

articles.title: Huawei Watch Fit 5 Pro in for review
articles.summary: Huawei's Watch Fit 5 Pro is officially global, and is priced at £250. The watch comes in Orange, White, and Black. In the box, you'll find the watch, a nice orange fabric strap (in our case), and the universal wireless charging puck (though one that sadly still ends on a USB-A port). The lineup's design is very similar to Apple's Watch and Watch Ultra, but this year we are starting to see more difference. The front is no longer a flat glass surface like on the Huawei Watch Fit 4 Pro, and instead, there's a noticeable 2.5D curve to the glass. It's still a sapphire crystal glass, so you...
articles.title_zh: Huawei Watch Fit 5 Pro 評測中
articles.summary_zh: Huawei Watch Fit 5 Pro 正式進入全球市場，定價為 £250。手錶提供橙色、白色和黑色三種款式，盒內包含手錶、精美的橙色織物表帶和通用無線充電片。

articles.title: Weekly deals: the Google Pixel 10 series is up to $300 off, Galaxy A37 gets its first real discount
articles.summary: We’ve been watching the prices of Pixel 10 phones fluctuate over the last few weeks, but it’s rare to see all four non-folding models get solid discounts at the same time. Meanwhile, the Galaxy A37 got its first actual price drop. The Google Pixel 10 Pro XL is $300 off at the moment – this puts the base model (which has 256GB storage, unlike the other three) at $900. The 512GB model is just over $1,000. We have a detailed comparison article that pits the Pixel 10 Pro XL against the Galaxy S26 Ultra to help you choose between the two flagships. ...
articles.title_zh: 每週優惠：Google Pixel 10 系列最高優惠 $300，Galaxy A37 首次獲得實際折扣
articles.summary_zh: 在過去幾週，我們一直在觀察 Pixel 10 手機的價格波動，但很少看到所有四款非折疊機型同時獲得實質折扣。同時，Galaxy A37 首次獲得實際降價。Google Pixel 10 Pro XL 目前優惠 $300。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds3 Pro and Buds4 Pro receive stability-focused software updates
articles.summary: Samsung has released new software updates for the Galaxy Buds3 Pro and Galaxy Buds4 Pro TWS earphones. The update for the Samsung Galaxy Buds3 Pro comes with firmware version R630XXU0AZD2, requires a download of about 8MB, and brings stability-focused improvements to the earphones. The update for the Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro, on the other hand, weighs around 8.5MB and comes with firmware version R640XXU0AZD2. But the Buds4 Pro's update, like the Buds3 Pro's, also focuses on stability, as the changelog says the device's behavior has been improved. The software update for the...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy Buds3 Pro 和 Buds4 Pro 獲得穩定性為重點的軟體更新
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 為 Galaxy Buds3 Pro 和 Galaxy Buds4 Pro TWS 耳機發布了新軟體更新。Galaxy Buds3 Pro 的更新版本號為 R630XXU0AZD2，下載大小約 8MB，為耳機帶來穩定性改進。

articles.title: Nothing Ear (open) Bluetooth earphones are getting a new color on May 11
articles.summary: Nothing launched the Ear (open) TWS earphones in September 2024, but they are still offered in a single color - white. Well, the white model will be joined by a new color next week, as Nothing has announced it will launch the blue version of the Ear (open) on May 11. Nothing hasn't revealed the blue Ear (open) entirely yet, but it did give us a glimpse of the new colorway by sharing its photo on X. You can check it below. Lots of things are blue: the sky, the ocean, a 1996-era Walkman. Swimming pools, tennis courts, everything by Yves Klein. Ear (open) is blue too.11.05....
articles.title_zh: Nothing Ear (open) Bluetooth 耳機將於 5 月 11 日推出新配色
articles.summary_zh: Nothing 於 2024 年 9 月推出了 Ear (open) TWS 耳機，但目前仍只有白色單一配色。白色款將於下週新增藍色版本，Nothing 已宣布將於 5 月 11 日推出 Ear (open) 藍色款。

articles.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
articles.summary: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.
articles.title_zh: 你聽過這些AI術語並點頭同意；讓我們來解決這個問題
articles.summary_zh: AI的興起帶來了大量新術語和行話。本詞彙表提供了一些你可能遇到的最重要詞彙和短語的定義。

articles.title: "OncoAgent: A Dual-Tier Multi-Agent Framework for Privacy-Preserving Oncology Clinical Decision Support"
articles.title_zh: OncoAgent: A Dual-Tier Multi-Agent Framework for Privacy-Preserving Oncology Clinical Decision Support

articles.title: Tanzu Platform’s 15-year head start meets the AI moment
articles.summary: In 2011, Marc Andreessen famously observed that software was eating the world , anticipating that every industry would be reshaped or displaced by software-driven competitors. This framing accelerated an era of platform reinvention.  Six years later, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang extended the metaphor, predicting that AI models would replace code written by humans: “ software is eating the world, but AI is going to eat software .” Nearly a decade on, that prediction is taking shape with palpable urgency, and the new demands are amplifying the limitations of the infrastructure choices many enterprises made the first time around. “When AI is reshaping your industry on a timeline measured in quarters, is now the moment to build your own platform?” Here is the questi
articles.title_zh: Tanzu Platform 的 15 年領先優勢遇上 AI 時代
articles.summary_zh: 2011年，Marc Andreessen 提出「軟體正在吞噬世界」的著名觀點，預示每個產業都將被軟體驅動的競爭者重塑或取代，這一框架加速了平台創新的時代。

articles.title: Film Star Vijay Forms New Government in India’s Key iPhone Hub
articles.summary: South Indian film star C. Joseph Vijay’s party secured support of smaller parties to reach a majority and form the government in Tamil Nadu, one of India’s most industrialized states and a key hub for automobile and iPhone production.
articles.title_zh: 電影明星維傑在印度關鍵 iPhone 樞紐成立新政府
articles.summary_zh: 南印度電影明星 C. Joseph Vijay 的政黨獲得小黨支持達成多數，在印度工業化最發達的泰米爾納德邦成立政府，該邦是汽車和 iPhone 生產的關鍵樞紐。

articles.title: Malaysia Mulls Steps Against Meta on Fake Royal Accounts: Report
articles.summary: Malaysia is studying actions to be taken against Meta Platforms Inc. for failing to curb fake accounts involving the country’s Malay rulers, Bernama reported, citing Communications Minister Fahmi Fadzil.
articles.title_zh: 馬來西亞考慮對 Meta 採取行動應對假皇家帳戶：報導
articles.summary_zh: 馬來西亞正在研究對 Meta Platforms Inc. 採取行動，因其未能遏制涉及該國馬來統治者的假帳戶，通訊部長 Fahmi Fadzil 向馬來西亞通訊社證實。

articles.title: Banks and Crypto Backers Tussle as Senators Eye Landmark Digital Asset Bill
articles.summary: Banking groups are floating last-minute changes to a compromise on stablecoin yield as a key Senate panel begins considering a landmark digital asset bill.
articles.title_zh: 銀行與加密支持者在參議員關注里程碑數位資產法案時對立
articles.summary_zh: 銀行集團就 stablecoin 收益妥協方案提出臨時修改，而關鍵參議院小組開始審議里程碑數位資產法案。

articles.title: cPanel新揭露與修補3個漏洞

articles.title: Former Epic director is building a European rival to the Unreal and Unity game engines — 'The Immense Engine' dev sees opportunity for AI agents to 'do the work of ten or fifteen people'
articles.summary: A heavyweight games industry veteran says he is building a fully European alternative to popular games engines from American and Chinese companies.
articles.title_zh: 前Epic總監正在打造Unreal和Unity遊戲引擎的歐洲競爭對手——「The Immense Engine」開發者認為AI代理可以「完成十到十五人的工作」
articles.summary_zh: 一位遊戲業資深人士表示正在開發完全由歐洲開發的遊戲引擎，作為美國和中國公司流行引擎的替代品。

articles.title: China's Hanyuan-2 debuts as 'world's first' dual-core quantum computer — 200-qubit claims incredible power efficiency, but lacks critical performance benchmarks
articles.summary: CAS Cold Atom Technology, a Wuhan-based firm affiliated with the Chinese Academy of Sciences (CAS), unveiled what it calls the world's first dual-core quantum computer.
articles.title_zh: 中國Hanyuan-2亮相「全球首款」雙核量子計算機——200量子位聲稱具有驚人的功率效率，但缺乏關鍵性能基準
articles.summary_zh: 與中國科學院(CAS)附屬的武漢企業CAS Cold Atom Technology公開推出其號稱全球首款雙核量子計算機。

articles.title: 3DMakerPro Toucan 3D Scanner review: All-in-one 3D scanning
articles.summary: Designed to be used as a standalone device, the 3DMakerPro Toucan allows users to capture a point cloud, generate a 3D model, and export it without using a computer. The hardware has a premium feel, and the Class 3R laser can create detailed point clouds quickly. However, the software lacks polish and has some quirks. Tracking loss, inconsistent export via Wi-Fi, and blurry color textures are all issues that occurred during testing.
articles.title_zh: 3DMakerPro Toucan 3D掃描器評測：一體化3D掃描解決方案
articles.summary_zh: 3DMakerPro Toucan設計為獨立設備，允許用戶無需電腦即可捕捉點雲、生成3D模型並導出；硬體具有優質感受，Class 3R雷射能快速創建詳細點雲，但軟體缺乏完善。

articles.title: AI data center project secretly sucked 29 million gallons of water over 15 months before detected by residents complaining about low water pressure — officials refuse to fine builders of massive 6.2 million-square-foot facility over unauthorized water use
articles.summary: QTS says the extra 29 million gallons were consumed during temporary construction activities, including concrete work, dust control, and site preparation.
articles.title_zh: AI數據中心項目秘密消耗2,900萬加侖水超過15個月才被低水壓投訴居民發現——官員拒絕對未授權用水的620萬平方英尺設施建築商罰款
articles.summary_zh: QTS表示這額外的2,900萬加侖用水消耗於臨時施工活動，包括混凝土施工、防塵和場地準備。

articles.title: Tiny credit card computer includes eInk screen and is just 1mm thick — Muxcard is powered by the ESP32-C3 microcontroller
articles.summary: A GitHub project shares details of the prototype for 'a fully working computer that is literally the size of a credit card,' dubbed the Muxcard
articles.title_zh: 微型信用卡電腦配備電子墨水屏幕且厚度僅1毫米——Muxcard由ESP32-C3微控制器驅動
articles.summary_zh: GitHub項目分享了名為Muxcard的原型設計細節，這是「一台字面上信用卡大小的功能完整電腦」。

articles.title: AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 vs Ryzen 9 9950X3D faceoff — How far does dual cache take you?
articles.summary: AMD's new Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 is a unique CPU, but how does it stack up to the single-cache Ryzen 9 9950X3D? We put the two head-to-head in a six-round gauntlet.
articles.title_zh: AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 對比 Ryzen 9 9950X3D——雙快取能帶你走多遠？
articles.summary_zh: AMD新款Ryzen 9 9950X3D2是款獨特的CPU，但與單快取的Ryzen 9 9950X3D相比表現如何？我們進行了六輪對標測試。

articles.title: AMD's legendary K5, its first independently-designed processor, is being removed from the Linux kernel — 4.3-million-transistor chip gets the axe because it lacks Time Stamp Counter (TSC) support, making it a coding burden
articles.summary: AMD’s landmark K5 processor family will no longer be supported by Linux when kernel version 7.2 arrives.
articles.title_zh: AMD傳奇K5(首款獨立設計的處理器)被從Linux核心中移除——這款430萬晶體管芯片因缺乏Time Stamp Counter(TSC)支援而被淘汰，成為編碼負擔
articles.summary_zh: 當Linux核心版本7.2發布時，AMD標誌性的K5處理器系列將不再獲得支援。

articles.title: Louis Rossmann tells 3D printer maker Bambu Lab to ‘Go (Bleep) yourself’ over its threatened lawsuit against enthusiast — Right to Repair advocate offers to pay the legal fees for a threatened OrcaSlicer developer
articles.summary: Louis Rossmann has officially pledged $10,000 to cover the initial legal fees for an independent software developer threatened with a cease and desist letter from Bambu Lab. He posted a video on Saturday to mobilize the Right to Repair community to back the developer and crowd-fund his legal defense.
articles.title_zh: Louis Rossmann要求3D打印機製造商Bambu Lab「滾蛋」——維修權倡導者提議為受威脅的愛好者支付法律費用
articles.summary_zh: Louis Rossmann正式承諾支付1萬美元用於覆蓋受Bambu Lab禁止令威脅的獨立軟體開發者的初期法律費用，並發布影片動員維修權社群為該開發者眾籌法律辯護。

articles.title: AI data centers face increasing complaints about inaudible but 'felt' infrasound — citizens complain high- and low-frequency sounds do not register on decibel meters but cause adverse health effects
articles.summary: Residents living near data centers are raising concerns about noise pollution, as these massive sites operate 24/7 and generate low-frequency sounds that disturb the neighborhood's peace.
articles.title_zh: AI數據中心面臨關於無聲但「可感受」次聲的投訴增加——公民抱怨高頻和低頻聲音無法在分貝計上註冊但導致不良健康影響
articles.summary_zh: 住在數據中心附近的居民對噪聲污染提出關注，因為這些大型設施24/7運營並產生會擾亂社區寧靜的低頻聲音。

articles.title: $200 'socketed' Nvidia AI GPU for servers hacked into a PCIe card with custom PCB and 3D-printed cooling — modded Tesla V100 SMX data center GPU runs AI LLMs and is more efficient than many modern midrange offerings in AI inference
articles.summary: Turns out, Nvidia's older Turing-era V100 AI GPU is still pretty capable today, even with just 16GB of VRAM. A YouTuber got his hands on the SMX variant for just $100, converted it to a PCIe x16 interface for another $100 with an adapter, and got some pretty impressive results across AI inference and NVR benchmarks.
articles.title_zh: 200美元「插槽式」Nvidia AI GPU被改造成帶有定製PCB和3D打印冷卻的PCIe卡——改裝的Tesla V100 SMX數據中心GPU運行AI LLM，AI推理效率超過許多現代中端產品
articles.summary_zh: 事實證明Nvidia Turing時代的V100 AI GPU即使只有16GB VRAM至今仍相當強大；一名YouTuber以100美元購得SMX變體，再花100美元製作適配器轉換為PCIe x16接口，在AI推理方面取得令人印象深刻的成果。

articles.title: NASA pushes Mars helicopter rotors past the speed of sound for the first time ever — next-gen “SkyFall” aircraft's rotors hit 3,750 RPM, ten times faster than normal helicopters
articles.summary: NASA successfully tested Mars helicopter rotors at Mach 1.08 inside JPL’s Mars simulator chamber, paving the way for larger next-generation aircraft under the proposed SkyFall mission to explore more of the Red Planet.
articles.title_zh: NASA將火星直升機旋翼推進超音速——下一代「SkyFall」飛行器旋翼達到3,750轉/分，是普通直升機的十倍
articles.summary_zh: NASA在JPL火星模擬艙內成功測試了火星直升機旋翼達到1.08馬赫，為擬議的SkyFall任務中更大型下一代飛行器探索火星鋪平道路。

articles.title: Ukraine’s new AI-guided laser destroys Shahed suicide drones in seconds from 3.1 miles away — also useful for demining operations, trailer-mounted Tryzub system is in final stages of testing
articles.summary: Ukraine has developed a mobile AI-powered anti-drone laser that can down lethal Shahed drones up to 3.1 miles away.
articles.title_zh: 烏克蘭新型AI導引激光在3.1英里外數秒內摧毀Shahed自殺無人機——拖車式Tryzub系統也適用於排雷作業，目前處於最終測試階段
articles.summary_zh: 烏克蘭開發了一款移動式AI驅動的反無人機激光系統，可在3.1英里外擊落致命的Shahed無人機。

articles.title: Report: macOS 27 to feature UI tweaks to address some Tahoe design complaints
articles.summary: Apple is preparing to roll out a ‘slight redesign’ for the next version of macOS, according to Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman . The update will feature a refinement of the Liquid Glass design language, cleaning up some of the rough edges seen in the Tahoe user interface. This will apparently include tweaks to the use of transparency and shadows across the system, which should address some user criticism about poor contrast when using Tahoe apps. more…
articles.title_zh: 報告：macOS 27 將推出UI調整以解決部分Tahoe設計投訴
articles.summary_zh: 根據Bloomberg記者Mark Gurman報導，Apple正準備為下一版本的macOS推出「輕微重新設計」，將改進Liquid Glass設計語言並清理Tahoe用戶界面中的粗糙邊界。

articles.title: Apple’s biggest iPad competitor isn’t Android, it’s older iPads
articles.summary: For the most part, iPad has dominated the tablet market – and that probably won’t be changing anytime soon. In recent years, though, I think many people have been struggling to come up with reasons to buy a new iPad – especially when the previous generations have been so good. While this likely isn’t a huge problem quite yet, I do think it raises some questions going forward. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple最大的iPad競爭對手不是Android，而是更舊的iPad
articles.summary_zh: iPad在平板市場中持續佔主導地位，但近年許多人很難找到購買新iPad的理由，因為前代產品表現已經非常出色。

articles.title: The Pixel 11’s Tensor G6 sounds promising — until you compare it to rival flagship chips
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority The latest Tensor G6 leak is good and bad news for the Pixel 11, adding more weight to what we already expected from Google’s next-gen chip destined for this year’s Pixel 11 series . On the one hand, it looks like Pixel 11 customers are set to benefit from a significant leap in CPU performance. The chip is expected to feature a single Arm C1-Ultra core at 4.11GHz, alongside four C1-Pro cores at 3.38GHz and two C1-Pro cores at 2.65GHz. Google is completely skipping the Arm Cortex X925 era, jumping straight to the same CPU cohort as the powerhouse MediaTek Dimensity 9500.
articles.title_zh: Pixel 11的Tensor G6聽起來很有前景——直到你將其與競爭對手旗艦芯片比較
articles.summary_zh: 最新的Tensor G6洩露為Pixel 11帶來好壞參半的消息，確認了Google下一代芯片的預期表現。

articles.title: Samsung Messages is almost dead, and Google Messages is still missing 5 big features
articles.summary: Samsung Messages is shutting down in a matter of weeks. Starting in July, the app will no longer be supported, and Samsung will push users to switch to Google Messages instead. As it turns out, Samsung Messages has a lot of dedicated fans among Android Authority ‘s readership, and you’ve all been vocal in our comments about the features Samsung’s app offers that Google’s doesn’t. Google Messages has been adding impactful new features pretty frequently lately — a new trash folder last month, real-time location sharing weeks earlier — but there’s still plenty the app can’t do . Here are five Samsung Messages features Android Authority ‘s commenters say they’ll miss most once the app winds down. Chat customization
articles.title_zh: Samsung Messages近乎停運，而Google Messages仍缺少5大功能
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Messages將在數週內關閉，從7月開始不再支援該應用，Samsung將推動用戶轉換到Google Messages。

articles.title: Plex’s price hikes prove I was right to switch to Jellyfin
articles.summary: Credit: Robert Triggs / Android Authority Plex will soon charge you even more to stream your own media over the internet. While I’m not a fan of schadenfreude, decisions like this do make me feel vindicated about my choice to adopt Jellyfin instead of Plex several years ago. The very concept of being charged a subscription fee to access your own media rubs me the wrong way. It’s an anathema to the whole self-hosted ethos and a bid to escape the spiraling costs of music and video subscription services. If Netflix isn’t getting my money for original programming, I’m certainly not handing Plex cash to rewatch my old Spaced DVDs.
articles.title_zh: Plex的漲價證明我當初轉向Jellyfin是正確的選擇
articles.summary_zh: Plex將很快提高串流你自己媒體內容的費用，這進一步驗證了我幾年前選擇採用Jellyfin而非Plex的決定。

articles.title: How I stopped Nova Launcher from tracking me without sacrificing my setup
articles.summary: It’s fair to say that Nova Launcher was once the pinnacle of the Android launcher space. While many of its loyal fans still believe it is, there’s no doubt it has experienced some ups and downs in recent years. You likely know the Nova Launcher story by now. The app was sold in 2022, lay dormant for years afterward, and was recently purchased, with development ramping up once more. The launcher’s new custodians have focused on stability over new features, but some worrying additions have alienated me. From an injection of trackers to the proliferation of ads, to plans for an agentic AI assistant , and an admission in the privacy policy that the launcher may sample user information — I just don’t feel comfortable using Nova anymore. But, a slew of users still rely on this app as an importan
articles.title_zh: 我如何在不犧牲設置的情況下阻止Nova Launcher追蹤我
articles.summary_zh: Nova Launcher曾是Android啟動器領域的頂尖應用，但在2022年被收購後經歷了一些起伏。

articles.title: 5 Android phones you should buy instead of the Motorola Razr Fold
articles.summary: Motorola has been teasing its first book-style foldable, the Razr Fold, since January. Finally, though, the phone will be available for pre-order in the US on May 14 , with sales starting a week later on May 21. There’s a lot to get excited about here, including the large 8.1-inch 2K LTPO display with pen support, the 6,000mAh battery with 80W of fast charging, and a triple 50MP camera setup with a main lens, an ultrawide, and a 3x telephoto. But, despite Motorola’s pedigree in the Razr clamshell line-up, this is still its first foray into larger foldables, and there are concerns about the Razr Fold’s crease, the real performance of those cameras, and whether the software optimization is just as good for a larger screen as it is for a smaller one.
articles.title_zh: 5款你應該購買而非Motorola Razr Fold的Android手機
articles.summary_zh: Motorola自1月開始預告其首款書式可摺疊手機Razr Fold，將於5月14日開始在美國預訂，5月21日正式發售。

articles.title: This Pixel safety feature is making my driving less safe
articles.summary: Our hearing is important, and it’s something we should want to protect. Google agrees; Pixel phones have something called “Sound Exposure Notifications” that monitor how loud your audio is and provide a warning if it thinks things are too loud. That sounds all well and good, but in some situations, like when driving, this feature puts users in danger instead of protecting them. So, why do I feel like Sound Exposure Notifications are compromising my safety? The notifications trigger whenever the phone hears what it thinks is an unsafe sound level, and it doesn’t matter what situation you’re in. When the notification shows up, ignoring it leads to the phone lowering the volume on its own to what it considers a safe level. In my experience, that’s only one button click above total silence, ma
articles.title_zh: 這個Pixel安全功能正在降低我的駕駛安全
articles.summary_zh: Pixel手機的「Sound Exposure Notifications」功能會監測音頻音量並在過大時發出警告，但在某些情況下可能適得其反。

articles.title: There’s never been a better time to grab a new Google TV launcher
articles.summary: It’s always exciting when a product receives a new software update, but I can’t help but shudder nowadays when Google TV rolls one out. With its latest revision, Google seems intent on making you love YouTube Shorts, placing the short-form video content made for vertical devices on the default Google TV home screen. Thankfully, you don’t have to stand for this or any of the home screen quirks. The first thing I did after purchasing my Chromecast with Google TV was install a third-party launcher. Given the latest update, there’s never been a better time to join the club.
articles.title_zh: 從未有過比現在更好的時機來使用新的Google TV啟動器
articles.summary_zh: Google TV的最新更新似乎致力於推廣YouTube Shorts，將短影音內容放在默認Google TV首頁上。

articles.title: Sony Xperia 1 VIII listed, coming May 13, Xiaomi 17T series leaks, Week 19 in review
articles.summary: Welcome to this week's recap. The Sony Xperia 1 VIII was prematurely listed on Amazon, revealing a very hefty price tag - €1,868.99 in Germany, £1,728 in the UK. Sony later announced the official date for the Xperia 1 VIII unveiling - May 13. The Xiaomi 17T and 17T Pro leaked. We got both specs and renders of the upcoming phones. The Xiaomi 17T will have a 6.59-inch 120Hz AMOLED, and the Dimensity 8500-Ultra SoC with 12GB of RAM, and 512GB of storage. It gets a triple camera system with a 50MP main camera, 50MP 5x zoom, and a 12MP ultrawide. Upfront is a 32MP selfie. Finally, expect a...
articles.title_zh: Sony Xperia 1 VIII上市，5月13日發佈，Xiaomi 17T系列洩露，第19週回顧
articles.summary_zh: Sony Xperia 1 VIII在Amazon上被提前上架，價格高達€1,868.99，Sony已宣佈官方發佈日期為5月13日；Xiaomi 17T和17T Pro規格也已洩露。

articles.title: Weekly deals: the Samsung Galaxy S26 trio gets discounts up to €500, iPhones also get price cuts
articles.summary: We’re headed into the second half of 2026, which is when Samsung switches its focus to the Z-foldables. Meanwhile, the S26 series has received some pretty significant price cuts. We start with the Samsung Galaxy S26. The base model – which finally features 256GB of storage instead of 128GB – is €165 off. There’s the option to upgrade to 512GB, which also involves a discount voucher. All three S26 phones follow the same pattern – straight discount for a 256GB model, discount + voucher for the 512GB model. Samsung Galaxy...
articles.title_zh: 每週優惠：Samsung Galaxy S26三重奏最高折扣€500，iPhone也降價
articles.summary_zh: 2026年下半年即將到來，Samsung將轉向Z-可摺疊手機，S26系列目前獲得顯著降價。

articles.title: Weekly poll: would you buy a Motorola Razr 70, Razr 70+ or Razr 70 Ultra? Which one?
articles.summary: While this year the big news in the Motorola Razr family is the launch of the first book-style foldable, the Razr brand is still very much associated with flip foldables. The company refreshed its offerings with three new models: the Razr 70, Razr 70+ and Razr 70 Ultra. As usual, these will have slightly different names in the US: Razr 2026, Razr+ 2026 and Razr Ultra 2026. Let’s start with the top model. The Motorola Razr 70 Ultra (aka Razr Ultra 2026) is an iterative update – it uses the same Snapdragon 8 Elite silicon, although it does have the overclocked version (4.47GHz CPU...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票：你會購買Motorola Razr 70、Razr 70+還是Razr 70 Ultra？
articles.summary_zh: 今年Motorola Razr系列的大新聞是首款書式可摺疊手機的推出，但Razr品牌仍與翻蓋式可摺疊手機息息相關，新推三款型號。

articles.title: Meta to Start Capturing Employee Mouse Movements, Keystrokes for AI Training Data
articles.title_zh: Meta開始捕捉員工滑鼠移動和按鍵記錄用於AI訓練數據

articles.title: Voice AI in India is hard. Wispr Flow is betting on it anyway.
articles.summary: Wispr Flow says growth accelerated in India after its Hinglish rollout, even as voice AI products continue to face challenges.
articles.title_zh: 在印度推出語音 AI 很困難。Wispr Flow 仍然在押注它。
articles.summary_zh: Wispr Flow 表示在推出 Hinglish 版本後，印度市場增長加速，儘管語音 AI 產品持續面臨挑戰。

articles.title: Why Prometheus couldn’t see Cilium metrics at 2 a.m.
articles.summary: I still remember the first time we lost sleep over something that wasn’t a bug. It was a Tuesday. Grafana dashboards showed blank panels for Cilium network metrics. Hubble was working fine — DNS visibility, TCP flows, and HTTP latency were all there in the Hubble UI. But the on-call engineer staring at Grafana at 2 AM couldn’t see any of it. The reason? Prometheus had no ServiceMonitors wired to Cilium’s agent and operator pods. Two Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) projects, both installed correctly, were completely invisible to each other. This is what’s known as the integration tax. It’s the hidden cost of running multiple CNCF projects together in production, and it’s where most platform teams spend 80% of their time — not installi
articles.title_zh: 為什麼 Prometheus 在凌晨 2 點無法看到 Cilium 指標
articles.summary_zh: Grafana 儀表板上 Cilium 網路指標的面板顯示為空白，但 Hubble UI 中的 DNS 可見性、TCP 流和 HTTP 延遲都正常運作，導致值班工程師失眠排查此問題。

articles.title: Anthropic puts the “myth” in Mythos with its HackerOne bug bounty program
articles.summary: Bug bounty programs have been a cornerstone of cybersecurity for years, serving as conduits for hackers and security researchers to responsibly disclose vulnerabilities before malicious actors can exploit them. And so it should come as little surprise that Anthropic has formally launched its own public bug bounty program, opening its security reporting pipeline to the wider research community after previously running tightly controlled safety-testing initiatives. However, the launch comes exactly one month after Anthropic unveiled Claude Mythos and Project Glasswing , a restricted-access cybersecurity initiative centered around a more advanced frontier model that the company claims can identify and chain together software vulnerabilities far more effectively than its current public systems
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 透過 HackerOne Bug Bounty 計劃落實 Mythos
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 正式推出自己的漏洞賞金計劃，讓駭客和安全研究人員能夠在惡意攻擊者利用漏洞前負責任地披露安全漏洞。

articles.title: The attack surface moved inside the agent. So did Arcjet.
articles.summary: As AI agents take over more application logic, such as reading files, fetching web pages, and processing queue messages, the security tools built around HTTP boundaries are no longer effective. Arcjet wants to fix that with its latest offering. The San Francisco-based runtime security company recently announced Guards , a capability that enforces security policy inside AI agent tool handlers , queue consumers, and workflow steps, as these are code paths that never touch an HTTP request and are therefore invisible to traditional web application firewalls (WAFs), proxies, and middleware, David Mytton , the company’s CEO, tells The New Stack . The gap Guards is targeting The premise is straightforward. Traditional application security, such as WAFs, AI gateways, and proxies, assumes a r
articles.title_zh: 攻擊面轉移到代理內部，Arcjet 也跟著轉移
articles.summary_zh: 隨著 AI 代理接管越來越多應用程式邏輯（如讀取檔案、擷取網頁和處理佇列訊息），傳統的 HTTP 邊界安全工具已不再有效，Arcjet 推出最新解決方案來解決這一問題。

articles.title: Could Contact-Tracing Apps Help With the Hantavirus? Not Really
articles.summary: Contact-tracing apps were widely deployed during the Covid pandemic. They aren’t as helpful during smaller outbreaks.
articles.title_zh: 接觸追蹤應用程式能幫助對抗漢病毒嗎？並不能
articles.summary_zh: Covid 疫情期間廣泛部署的接觸追蹤應用程式在較小規模的疫情爆發中幫助有限。

articles.title: Do City Delivery Drones Make Sense? No One Knows, but They're Flying Over NYC
articles.summary: One of the country’s busiest airspaces has a new kind of flying machine—maybe temporarily.
articles.title_zh: 城市送貨無人機有意義嗎？沒人知道，但它們正在紐約上空飛行
articles.summary_zh: 美國最繁忙的空域之一出現了一種新型飛行器——也許只是暫時的。

articles.title: How Handheld Translators Work and Why They’re Handy for Travel
articles.summary: Your cell phone can handle basic language translation, but bespoke tools can offer a much more immersive experience.
articles.title_zh: 手持翻譯機如何運作以及為何對旅行有幫助
articles.summary_zh: 雖然手機可以處理基本的語言翻譯，但專門工具能提供更沉浸式的體驗。

articles.title: ‘Reservation Hijacking’ Scams Target Travelers. Here’s How to Stay Safe
articles.summary: The hotel staffer who calls you with an urgent request for payment isn’t necessarily who they say they are.
articles.title_zh: 「預訂劫持」詐騙鎖定旅客，以下是保護自己的方法
articles.summary_zh: 致電你要求緊急付款的飯店員工不一定就是他們聲稱的人。

articles.title: Apple to Make Design Changes in macOS 27 to Address Tahoe Quirks
articles.summary: Also: The latest on iOS 27 and the truth about the Vision Pro.
articles.title_zh: Apple 將在 macOS 27 中進行設計更改以解決 Tahoe 問題
articles.summary_zh: 還有：iOS 27 的最新進展和 Vision Pro 的真相。

articles.title: Microsoft’s African Data Center Falters on Payment Demands
articles.summary: A major Microsoft Corp. data center site in East Africa has been delayed by disagreements with the Kenyan government over the company’s request for guaranteed payments, people familiar with the matter said.
articles.title_zh: Microsoft 非洲數據中心因支付要求而陷入困境
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft Corp. 在東非的一個主要數據中心因與肯亞政府在保證付款要求上的分歧而延期。

articles.title: Why Stablecoins Are Crypto’s Real Payments Test
articles.summary: Every year, Filipinos working overseas send $35 billion back home — and a growing share of those transfers are being executed using stablecoins. The blockchain technology promises to make cross-border payments cheaper and nearly instantaneous, offering an alternative to traditional remittance channels. But even though the opportunity could be huge, stablecoins remain a tiny part of the global payments system today. With the GENIUS Act set to take effect and banks eyeing the space, the race to scale is just getting started. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 為什麼穩定幣是加密貨幣真正的支付測試
articles.summary_zh: 菲律賓海外工作者每年向家鄉匯款 350 億美元，其中越來越多的轉帳正透過穩定幣執行，區塊鏈技術承諾使跨境支付更便宜且幾近即時。

articles.title: Do you take after your dad’s RNA?
articles.summary: On a bright afternoon in Jiangsu, China, Xin Yin is playing personal trainer to some mice. One by one, he sets the rodents on a miniature treadmill that starts slow and gradually speeds up. These littermates are born athletes, able to run farther with less lactic acid buildup than average laboratory mice. The secret to their speediness isn’t carried in their genes—the animals come from the same genetic stock as a group of control mice. And they haven’t received any special training. Instead, their fitness seems to stem from their father’s exercise habits before they were even conceived. It’s a finding suggesting that running might benefit not just the exerciser, but also his unborn children . “I was very surprised when I first saw the data,” says Yin, a biochemist at Nanjing University. Re
articles.title_zh: 你有你父親的 RNA 遺傳嗎？
articles.summary_zh: 在中國江蘇的一個晴朗午後，尹昕正在為一些老鼠充當個人教練，這些同胞鼠生來就是運動員，能以更少的乳酸堆積跑得更遠。

articles.title: Huge landslide created a 500-meter-high tsunami in a major tourist area
articles.summary: At 5:26 am local time on August 10, 2025, a massive wedge of rock with a volume of at least 63.5 million cubic meters detached from a mountain above Alaska’s Tracy Arm fjord. The falling rock plummeted into the deep waters at the terminus of the South Sawyer Glacier and caused an initial 100-meter-high breaking wave that tore across the fjord at speeds exceeding 70 meters a second. When this wave hit the opposite shoreline, it surged up the steep rocks to a height of 481 meters above sea level. “It was the second highest tsunami ever recorded on Earth,” says Aram Fathian, a researcher at the University of Calgary and co-author of a recent Science study that reconstructed this event in detail. “But until now, almost nobody heard about it because it was a near-miss event,” he adds. articles.title_zh: 巨大山崩在主要旅遊區造成 500 公尺高的海嘯
articles.summary_zh: 2025 年 8 月 10 日當地時間凌晨 5 時 26 分，至少 6,350 萬立方公尺的巨大岩石從阿拉斯加 Tracy Arm 峽灣上方的山崖脫落，墜入南索耶冰川末端的深水中，引發初始 100 公尺高的海浪。

articles.title: Firefox大改版修復的漏洞其實不只271個！Mozilla基金會揭露近期結合AI處理的Firefox漏洞多達423個
articles.summary: 瀏覽器Firefox在4月下旬發布150版，Mozilla基金會表示，由於與AI模型大廠Anthropic合作，因此有機會採用早期版本的先進AI模型Claude Mythos Preview，經過初期評估發現大量漏洞，他們總共修補271個漏洞
